prompt: We're hosting an online R-Ladies talk on the shared R-Ladies Zoom. How do I book it and start as host on the day?
assertions: Says to book via the Calendly link in the #online_meetups Slack channel (and not to share it publicly)
Says to put that exact Calendly/email Zoom link on Meetup and NOT connect a personal Zoom account
Mentions both the passcode and the host key
Recommends a ~15-minute buffer before the announced start time
Explains claiming host: Participants list > Claim Host, then enter the host key
Says to remind attendees of the Code of Conduct at the start
Says to END the meeting (not just leave) so the next organizer can use the room
